# Issue #7: Inventory service

## Description
Implement inventory management service for tracking and managing material quantities.

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement inventory query (get all, get by product)
- [ ] Implement reserve materials function
- [ ] Implement consume materials function
- [ ] Implement release reservation function (on order cancel)
- [ ] Implement manual inventory adjustment
- [ ] Prevent oversubscription (cannot reserve more than available)
- [ ] Add warehouse capacity checks

## Acceptance Criteria
- Materials can be reserved for released orders
- Consumption updates inventory correctly
- Cannot over-reserve or over-consume
- Warehouse capacity enforced

## Phase
Phase 2 - Core Simulation
